metadata.title: Go Your Own Way (2001 Remaster)
metadata.lyrics:
[00:04.89] Loving you isn't the right thing to do
[00:11.89] How can I ever change things that I feel?
[00:18.95] If I could, maybe I'd give you my world
[00:25.94] How can I when you won't take it from me?
[00:33.64] You can go your own way, go your own way
[00:40.64] You can call it another lonely day
[00:47.64] You can go your own way, go your own way
[00:54.48] Tell me why everything turned around
[01:01.44] Packing up, shacking up's all you wanna do
[01:08.61] If I could, baby, I'd give you my world
[01:15.57] Open up, everything's waiting for you
[01:22.82] You can go your own way, go your own way
[01:30.12] You can call it another lonely day
[01:36.64] You can go your own way, go your own way
[01:44.59]

[02:19.97] You can call it another lonely day, another lonely day
